concerns.text: FR-001 mandates ingestion from 'NCBI SRA'. The plan.md (Phase 0) and research.md only reference HuggingFace URLs (pie/ncbi_disease, etc.) which are unrelated to microbiome data. The plan lacks a specific task or data source mapping to satisfy the NCBI SRA ingestion requirement defined in FR-001.

SC-004 requires measuring the 'count of significant taxa' against an 'expected range'. The plan.md Phase 2 mentions 'Count of significant taxa' as an output but does not define the measurement logic or the reference range (low/high single-digit) against which this success criterion will be validated.
